title: Active Context Profile
description: Per-workspace artifact written to .cache/index/active_context_profile.v1.json. Records which context profile is currently active, how it was resolved, and when it was activated.

activated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this profile was activated.

resolution_method.description: How the profile was selected: 'auto' = trigger_condition matched, 'explicit' = user/agent set it, 'default' = registry default, 'fallback' = error during resolution.

workspace_root.description: Workspace root path this profile applies to.

matched_trigger.description: ID of the trigger condition that matched (if resolution_method=auto).

bootstrap_commands_run.description: Bootstrap commands that were executed when this profile was activated.

notes.description: Diagnostic or audit notes recorded during profile activation.
